title: ChainVein
description: "ChainVein" enhances mining efficiency in Minecraft by enabling vein mining. Mine connected blocks and ores and wood in a chain with a single keypress for a faster and more streamlined experience.
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)


# 🔨 ChainVein - Efficient Vein Mining for Minecraft

ChainVein is a lightweight and efficient vein mining mod that revolutionizes your Minecraft mining experience. With just a single keypress (default: V), instantly mine connected ore veins and similar blocks, saving time while maintaining perfect gameplay balance.

## ✨ Core Features

*   🎯 Intelligent Mining System
    *   Smart vein detection with single-key activation (V)
    *   Multiple mining modes (3x3, Staircase Up/Down)
    *   Automatic tool durability protection
    *   Sneak-to-disable functionality
    *   Tool-appropriate mining requirements
    *   Added support for enchantments like Silk Touch and Fortune.
    *   Improved compatibility with popular mods for better integration.
*   🌟 Block Compatibility
    *   Complete vanilla ore support
    *   Raw ore blocks integration
    *   Popular modded ores (copper, tin, aluminum, silver, uranium)
    *   Universal "ore" keyword detection

## 🌍 International Support

Version 3.4.0 adds full localization for:

*   Arabic (العربية)
*   German (Deutsch)
*   English
*   Spanish (Español)
*   French (Français)
*   Italian (Italiano)
*   Japanese (日本語)
*   Korean (한국어)
*   Portuguese - Brazil (Português do Brasil)
*   Russian (Русский)
*   Chinese - Simplified (简体中文)

## ⚙️ Technical Excellence

*   Full server compatibility
*   Support for staircase modes on servers
*   Optimized performance impact
*   Customizable keybindings
*   Real-time action bar feedback

## 📦 Installation Guide

### Forge Version

1.  Install Minecraft Forge
2.  Place mod file in your mods folder
3.  Launch and enjoy!

### Fabric Version (2.0.0+)

1.  Install Minecraft Fabric (1.21+)
2.  Download & install Fabric API
3.  Add mod to mods folder
4.  Start playing!

## 🆕 Version History

### ChainVein-3.8.0

*   🔧 Fixes:
    *   Resolved compatibility issues with Forge versions 1.21.1 to 1.21.4 on servers.
    *   The mod now runs correctly on servers without being restricted to version 1.21 only.
*   ✨ New Features:
    *   Added support for enchantments like Silk Touch and Fortune.
    *   Improved compatibility with popular mods for better integration.

### ChainVein-3.4.0

*   Added support for 11 languages
*   Fixed VeinMine modes functionality on servers
*   Added server support for staircase mining modes
*   Various performance improvements

### ChainVein-2.2.0

*   Advanced Mining Patterns (3x3, 5x5)
*   Enhanced durability protection with warning system
*   Expanded block support
*   Performance optimizations

### ChainVein-2.1.0 (1.19.2)

*   Tinkers' Tool Control integration
*   Enhanced customization options

### ChainVein-2.0.0

*   Complete tree cutting functionality
*   Support for all vanilla wood types
*   Nether wood compatibility
*   Enhanced modded wood detection

## 💡 Perfect For

*   Efficiency-focused miners
*   Modpack developers
*   Players seeking balanced automation
*   Server administrators

## 🎮 Usage

Hold the vein mine key (V) while mining to activate. Press M to cycle between mining modes. The mod automatically mines connected blocks while respecting tool requirements and durability.

## 📞 Support

Need assistance or have suggestions? Contact @5sam\_h
